text: Computes lineup design matrix given dataframe `lineups`, fits linear model using given `responses`.

title: Fit Lineup Linear Model ŌĆö fit_lineup_lm
Fit Lineup Linear Model ŌĆö fit_lineup_lm
text: lineups dataframe lineups assumed columns `blue1`, `blue2`, `blue3`, `red1`, `red2`, `red3`. can like dataframe matches output `event_matches`. responses list two vectors, `red` `blue`. must vector length number rows `lineups`, representing response value fit linear model . w Weights WLS fit. Weights extended `rep_len` length corresponding rows `lineups`.

title: Fit Lineup Linear Model ŌĆö fit_lineup_lm
text: Key assumption - order `lineups` `responses` vector must line exactly. Otherwise, fit meaningless. Fits regression origin - fixing intercept coefficient 0. Regression always origin model validity (want matrix full rank) , unlike basketball (R)APM, home team advantage account .
